decision: 2 PRs needed — FINAL-PR-09/10 remediation, release closure moves to FINAL-PR-11

recommended_next_prs.risk_if_skipped: FINAL-PR-09 would spend release closure effort explaining avoidable discoverability and lineage gaps.
scope: mark old static artifacts as historical where superseded
recommended_next_prs.title: Pre-release hub/CLI/report convergence hardening
recommended_next_prs.why_needed: The repo is cohesive enough to be release-near, but Local Hub endpoint naming, CLI discoverability, and report/proof cross-links remain uneven across older and newer spines.

recommended_next_prs.risk_if_skipped: Reviewers may confuse implicit guardrails with missing guardrails and ask for remediation during release closure.
scope: add deprecation notes for historical artifacts
recommended_next_prs.title: Bug6/Q7/ring boundary explicitness and release evidence polish
recommended_next_prs.why_needed: Bug6/Q7/ring-like boundaries are partly implicit through gates, claim boundaries, receipts, and registries; release reviewers would benefit from an explicit boundary map before closure.
